← Back to features Get the tool
★ Justaino Score

How the Meta Rating is worked out

Every player gets a 0-100 "Justaino Score" for each position, worked out entirely from their real stats and PlayStyles. Nothing is hidden - here are the exact weights the tool uses, position by position. It's my read of the current FC 26 meta, so it's meant to be tuned each season.

Rating = 85% × (50% × Stat fit + 50% × PlayStyle fit) + 15% × OVR
Stat weighting
50%
PlayStyle weighting
50%
OVR tiebreak
15%
  • Each card is scored against its best-fitting role for a position (Poacher vs Target Forward, Winger vs Inside Forward, and so on), then the top-scoring role wins.
  • Stat fit (0-99) is a weighted average of the six stats, using each position's weights below (plus weak foot & skill moves as light extras). Stats matter most where the weight is biggest - shooting for strikers, defending for centre-backs.
  • PlayStyle fit (0-100) counts the meta PlayStyles a card owns for that role - a PlayStyle+ counts 3.5× a basic, and every meta basic counts - measured against the best loadout the role could want.
  • The two halves blend, then the result is pulled just 15% toward the card's in-game OVR - a light tiebreak only, because a 97 with weak face stats plays nothing like a 97. The tables below are the underlying stat and PlayStyle emphasis per position.
A worked example - Maradona at CAM

The tool's own figures for a 97 Maradona judged at CAM (best-fitting role: Shadow Striker). Both halves come from his real stats and PlayStyles, run through the CAM tables below.

1Stat fit50% of the meta half
weighted average of his CAM stats, plus skill moves & weak foot = 92.5
× 50% = 46 pts of the blend
2PlayStyle fit50% of the meta half
his meta PlayStyles as a Shadow Striker = 83.3 (a PlayStyle+ is worth 3.5× a basic)
× 50% = 42 pts of the blend
3Blend, then pull toward OVR
46 + 42 = 88 meta
the 88 meta and 97 OVR, weighted 85 / 15 = 89.3
Justaino ScoreMaradona at CAM
89.3
The weights, position by position
STPlayStyle ceiling 82.5 pts
Stat weights how much each stat counts
Pace8
Shooting10
Passing4
Dribbling8
Defending1
Physical6
Meta PlayStyles best weight across this position's roles (a PlayStyle+ counts 3.5× a basic)
Finesse Shot4
Low Driven Shot4
Incisive Pass4
Enforcer4
Rapid3
Gamechanger3
Precision Header3
Quick Step2
First Touch2
Inventive2
Technical1
Tiki Taka1
Press Proven1
Pinged Pass1
By role the exact ordered weights the score uses - a card is judged on its best-fitting role. Click to open.

Men Gallant FC · Justaino FC Web App Tool - a personal tool for the EA FC 26 Web App.
Weights generated from the live tool on 2026-07-12. Refreshed each season as the meta shifts.
